[[File:BuenosAiresDescription.png|thumb|360x360px|New location for December 2025: [[Buenos Aires, Argentina]]]]
'''Locations''' are places a [[birb]] can travel to using [[Rainbow Stones]] in the [[Travel with Sass|Travel Agency]]. Every day, birbs can go on [[Adventuring|adventures]] and make new [[discoveries]]. Users can also purchase location-related [[clothing]] and [[furniture]] with [[Rainbow Stones|rainbow stones]] in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] and [[Finkea Furnishings]], respectively.

As of May 2026, there are 27 locations and 3 additional [[seasonal locations]].

==New Locations==
The most recent location release is [[Buenos Aires, Argentina]].

== About Locations ==

===Beginning Location ===
A birb always starts in [[Finchie Forest]]. When the birb becomes a [[Stages of Growth|child]] after twenty-two full energy days, the [[Travel with Sass|Travel Agency]] opens and it's possible to fly to different locations. The very first flight is free. 

===Travel Agency===
:''Main article: [[Travel with Sass]]''
The Travel Agency offers one-way flights to different locations. Flights cost 300 rainbow stones (except for Finchie Forest, which is 200 rainbow stones.) However, a birb can only travel to locations that are offered in the Travel Agency that day. The locations rotate day to day and are random. 

The flight to another location counts as that day's adventure and takes the same number of hours. At the end, the birb will make a  discovery at the new location. When a ticket is purchased, the birb will fly there after they gain full energy. However, if the birb has already gone on an adventure for the day, the flight will be scheduled for the next day, and will begin as soon as the birb is fully energized. 

===Shopping===
Each destination has four location-related clothing items and four location-related furniture and interior decorations. Clothes are in a multitude of colors, but furniture only comes in a maximum of four colors. (See the individual location page for specifics.) [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] and [[Finkea Furnishings]] each have a slot devoted to the location, and a random choice will be offered there. Refreshing the shop will change the selection until you have bou
ght them all. The Shops change upon landing at a new place, tailored for the new location. If you are careful, you can shop at your current location before fully energizing (which immediately starts the flight), and then shop again at your new location! 

=== Progress ===
A location does not have to be completely explored; progress will pick up when a birb travels there again. Each location has 15-20 location-specific discoveries, some of which are logged as [[Discoveries|special discoveries]].  Birbs will otherwise find personality-influencing  [[Unlogged discoveries|unlogged discoveries]] every day they [[Adventuring|Adventure]] in any location. Each adventure adds around 2% to location progress. Therefore, it takes around 50 full energy days to "completely" explore a location. By that time, all location-related discoveries will have been found. After 100%, a birb will still have an adventure every day it fully energizes, and will get a personality discovery. A location can still be revisited any time it's offered at the travel agency, allowing a birb to shop for local clothes and enjoy the scenery.
